description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Docs that runs on push to main and on pull requests. Use a concurrency group to cancel in-progress jobs. Run a matrix job on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.7 and 3.10, checking out the repository, installing dependencies including texlive, inkscape, and pandoc, then installing and listing packages, building HTML and PDF documentation with Sphinx, and uploading the results as artifacts. Also, perform a link check on the documentation.
